metadata.title:
SPOKANE MEN HAVE


SOLD REVIEW MINE

pages.raw_text:
The Bank of Commerce, of Green
wood. B. c., has bought the con-
trolling interest in the Review mine,
located at Bolster, Wash, from
Peter Larsen, Patrick WEIGH and
J. w. Stewart. Spokane railroad
The deal was consum-
mated through John T. Beattie,
manager of the bank. The mine has
been closed down for 4 years on ac-
count of lack of cheap transporta-
ton. Operations will begin again,
however. The Victoria, Vancouver
& Eastern railroad has agreed to
build a branch to Bolster and haul
Review ore and other ore of the
Myers Creek district. The mine
was purchased in 1900 for $35 600
and that much more was spent in
Although the assay
returns average S17 to the ton, ship
ments have been profitless on &C
count of the long wagon haul. The
consideration is said to have been
close to SO 900.
